title: messages: FileHeader.name has no type-level path traversal enforcement
description: ClearMessage::FileHeader.name is doc-commented as 'basename only -- no path components' but typed as String with no validation at the type level. The CLI receiver (cli/src/commands.rs) correctly calls safe_name() before use. However, any future receiver (nie-daemon, nie-bot, nie-wasm) that handles FileHeader and forgets safe_name() will have a path traversal vulnerability. The core types should enforce the invariant either by parsing at deserialization time (a newtype that rejects paths containing '/' or '..' components) or by providing a validated accessor. Current CLI defense-in-depth is correct but fragile to extension.
